---
title: "Applications"
description: >
  Discover all online applications that are available
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Applications}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

# <i class="far fa-chart-pie"></i> [General application](https://watjoa.shinyapps.io/CaviR/)

# <i class="far fa-chart-line"></i> [Regression modelling](https://watjoa.shinyapps.io/CaviRmodels/)
